segments.vo: [curious] Your AI can read the entire web... [serious] but it can't watch it. [matter-of-fact] Ninety percent of the internet is video — and to your agent, it's invisible. [intriguing] Show me the referee's call at minute sixty-seven. [confident] That answer isn't a link... it's a moment, inside a video. [confident] So VideoDB teamed up with TinyFish. [measured] TinyFish finds the right broadcast. VideoDB stitches the exact moments into one reel... [satisfied] already edited. [emphatic] Agents that don't just search the web... they understand it. [confident] VideoDB. With TinyFish.
